reviews.comment:
Buena y cordial atención. Aceptan tarjetas de credito y debito. Minishop buena atención, solo efectivo, WiFi y comidas rapidas. Como todos los minishop de estaciones de servicios: caro para un bolsillo normal. Horario estación de servicios las 24 hs y del mini shop de 7:00 a 21 hs

(Translated by Google)
Good and friendly service. They accept credit and debit cards. The convenience store has good service, cash only, Wi-Fi, and fast food. Like all convenience stores at gas stations: expensive for the average person. The gas station is open 24 hours, and the convenience store is open from 7:00 AM to 9:00 PM.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16090706033176576823/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3bVpDRWxnRRAB
